---
title: "Week 10: Metaprogramming"
---

```{r}
week <- 10
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## Main reference

* [17-20 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/metaprogramming.html)

## What you will learn this week

* Non-standard evaluation (changing the expression or environment)
* Abstract syntax trees
* tidyselect
* Symbols, expressions, quosures (names, calls, calls+environments)
* Parsing and evaluating code

## Pre-class activities

* Watch [Lazy evaluation](https://youtu.be/2BXPLnLMTYo) with Jenny Bryan
* Watch [Data mask programming patterns](https://youtu.be/jGfuTuq44fE)

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```


```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
